THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT ZAVEN GRIGORYAN AND PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT ARAM GRIGORYAN ARE NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT SF VH PROPERTY LLC REPRESENTED BY NERIJUS EIDUKEVICIUS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS. COURT DISMISSES CROSS COMPLAINAT WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE THERE WAS NO SERVICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
